reviewObjectives: Clean up bullshit docs and test scripts
Best practices audit (ESLint, Prettier, Husky, semantic commits, component building)
Docs markdown revamp (fact-check, reorganize, identify gaps)
CRITICAL: Light/Dark Mode Token Architecture - Audit and implement proper theming support
HIGH PRIORITY: Professional Brand Color Palette - Replace placeholder colors with production-ready design system

design-system-developer.scope: Token architecture, theming, CSS patterns - CRITICAL FOCUS: light/dark mode support, professional color palette audit
priorityDirectives: CRITICAL: Audit token architecture for light/dark mode support gaps
CRITICAL: Ensure tokens cascade properly in both light and dark modes
HIGH: Evaluate current color palette quality (placeholder vs production-ready)
HIGH: Document theming strategy for consumers
HIGH: Provide clear examples of light/dark mode usage

critical.title: ZERO light/dark mode implementation
critical.description: No @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark), no dark mode tokens, no theme switcher component
critical.impact: WCAG 2.1 AA failure, healthcare compliance risk, v1.0 blocker

critical.title: Placeholder color palette - not production-ready
critical.description: Current colors (#007878 teal) are placeholder quality (5/10), lack professional brand identity
critical.impact: Undermines library maturity perception, blocks marketing/demos

notes: Token architecture three-tier cascade is excellent (A rating)

critical.title: wc-container missing from Vite build config
critical.description: Component exists in src/components/ but not defined in entry points

critical.title: Missing changesets integration
critical.description: CLAUDE.md mandates changesets for version management but not installed or configured
critical.impact: Cannot manage versions/releases, blocks multi-dev workflow

high.title: No conventional commit enforcement
high.description: commitlint not configured despite documentation mandate
high.impact: Inconsistent commit history, blocks automated changelog

high.title: Component count documentation wrong
high.description: CLAUDE.md says 3 components, actually 13 exist
high.impact: Onboarding confusion, inaccurate system representation

notes: Architecture decisions are sound and enterprise-ready

typescript-specialist.scope: Type safety, strict mode, declaration files

critical.title: MISSING declaration files (.d.ts)
critical.description: Build configured for declaration:true but not generating .d.ts files, consumers get no type safety
critical.impact: TypeScript consumers cannot use library safely, blocks enterprise adoption

high.title: Missing strict mode flags
high.description: noUncheckedIndexedAccess and exactOptionalPropertyTypes not enabled in tsconfig
high.impact: Potential runtime errors from unchecked array access

notes: Zero 'any' types found across codebase (A+ rating)
Type inference working correctly in component definitions

lit-specialist.scope: Component implementation patterns, Lit 3.x best practices

high.title: Missing lifecycle super() calls
high.description: Only 4/14 components call super.connectedCallback() and super.disconnectedCallback()
high.impact: Potential memory leaks, broken inheritance chain if components are extended

high.title: Missing @state decorators
high.description: wc-card, wc-text-input, wc-textarea have reactive properties without @state decorator
high.impact: Re-renders may not trigger correctly, state management bugs

notes: Shadow DOM usage is correct and consistent
Event naming convention (wc- prefix) properly followed
CSS parts well-defined for styling hooks

high.title: Missing @storybook/addon-essentials
high.description: Manual addon management instead of using addon-essentials bundle
high.impact: Missing standard tooling (viewport, backgrounds, measure, outline)

high.title: NO CEM integration configured
high.description: Custom Elements Manifest exists (5245 lines) but Storybook not configured to consume it for autodocs
high.impact: Missing automatic API documentation from CEM

high.title: No theme switching decorator
high.description: Cannot preview dark mode or high-contrast themes in Storybook
high.impact: Cannot validate theming without manual DOM manipulation

medium.title: Minimal interaction tests
medium.description: Only 1 story has play function for interaction testing
medium.impact: User workflows not validated in Storybook

notes: Controls are well-defined for component properties

high.title: Function coverage gap
high.description: 84.96% function coverage (target: 95%), missing reportValidity() tests across form components
high.impact: Untested validation logic may fail in production

high.title: No integration tests
high.description: Zero multi-component workflow tests (e.g., form with inputs + button)
high.impact: Component interaction bugs not caught

high.title: No performance regression tests
high.description: No render time, memory leak, or bundle size tests
high.impact: Performance regressions undetected

notes: Test utilities (fixture, shadowQuery, oneEvent) are well-designed

qa-engineer-automation.scope: Test scripts, test quality, automation gaps

critical.title: ZERO VRT baselines generated
critical.description: Visual regression test infrastructure exists, 0 screenshots captured (36 tests dormant)
critical.impact: Visual regressions undetected, UI bugs shipped to production

high.title: Cross-browser testing not enabled
high.description: Chromium only, no Firefox/WebKit in test matrix
high.impact: Browser-specific bugs undetected

high.title: Storybook interaction tests minimal
high.description: Only 1 story with play function
high.impact: User interaction workflows not validated

notes: 112 component tests cover all major functionality

accessibility-engineer.scope: A11y compliance, ARIA patterns, WCAG audit

critical.title: wc-checkbox: Incorrect keyboard pattern
critical.description: tabindex="-1" breaks native keyboard interaction (WCAG 2.1.1 Level A)
critical.impact: Component unusable with keyboard, healthcare deployment blocked

critical.title: wc-radio: Missing ARIA attributes
critical.description: Incomplete role/focus implementation for radio groups
critical.impact: Screen readers cannot announce radio group state

critical.title: wc-badge: No semantic role for notifications
critical.description: Healthcare alerts not announced to assistive technology
critical.impact: Critical health notifications missed by screen reader users

critical.title: wc-card: Improper link role
critical.description: Using role="link" on div instead of semantic <a> element
critical.impact: Navigation patterns broken for AT users

high.title: Focus visible implementation gaps
high.description: Inconsistent :focus-visible styles across components
high.impact: Keyboard users cannot track focus position

high.title: Touch target size compliance
high.description: wc-button sm variant is 32px (WCAG minimum: 44px)
high.impact: Mobile users with motor impairments cannot activate

high.title: No color contrast automation
high.description: WCAG contrast ratios not programmatically verified
high.impact: Theming changes may introduce contrast failures

high.title: Generic error messages
high.description: Form validation lacks specific healthcare context
high.impact: Users don't understand how to fix errors

high.title: No screen reader testing documented
high.description: No NVDA, JAWS, or VoiceOver test procedures
high.impact: AT compatibility unknown

notes: 4 critical WCAG 2.1 Level A failures block healthcare deployment
5 high-priority issues block WCAG 2.1 AA certification
Semantic HTML usage is generally good

performance-engineer.scope: Bundle size, performance budgets, optimization opportunities

critical.title: Minification DISABLED
critical.description: vite.config.ts has minify: false (30-40% size penalty)

critical.title: wc-form violates budget
critical.impact: Exceeds performance budget, page load penalty

high.title: Large CSS payloads in JS
high.description: wc-form: 32KB CSS, wc-prose: 20KB scoped CSS embedded in JS bundles
high.impact: Parse/eval overhead, larger bundle sizes

medium.title: Token inlining inefficient
medium.description: 11KB CSS string with all 200+ tokens in every component

medium.title: No guard() or repeat() directives
medium.description: List rendering lacks efficient diffing (repeat directive)
medium.impact: Slower list updates, unnecessary DOM thrashing

medium.title: querySelector extensive
medium.impact: Repeated DOM queries may cause performance issues

critical.title: NO deployment automation
critical.description: Manual deployment only, no staging/production environments configured
critical.impact: Cannot deploy safely, blocks multi-environment workflow

critical.title: Library not publishable
critical.description: package.json has "private": true, blocks npm publishing

high.title: No Turborepo remote cache
high.description: CI could be <5s with remote cache, currently 12.22s
high.impact: Slow CI feedback loop

high.title: No Chromatic integration
high.description: No visual regression cloud service configured
high.impact: VRT baselines not persisted, manual screenshot management

high.title: No staging environment
high.description: Production-only deployment, no pre-production validation
high.impact: Cannot test releases before production

critical.title: NO actual Drupal integration artifacts
critical.description: Zero .twig files, libraries.yml, or PHP code despite being primary consumer
critical.impact: Cannot use in Drupal without writing everything from scratch

critical.title: CDN distribution not configured
critical.description: Documentation promises CDN delivery but no CDN setup exists
critical.impact: Cannot use via <script> tag as documented

notes: Components are Shadow DOM compatible (good for Drupal)
Progressive enhancement possible with current architecture
Documentation shows Drupal examples but no implementation

crossCuttingThemes.effort: 8 hours to audit and fix all docs

crossCuttingThemes.description: Quality standards documented but not enforced
Multiple blocking accessibility issues across components
High test count but missing critical test types
Core design system features missing or placeholder

actionItems.title: Implement Light/Dark Mode Token Architecture
actionItems.description: ZERO implementation of light/dark mode. No @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark), no dark mode tokens, no theme switcher. This is a v1.0 blocker and WCAG 2.1 AA compliance requirement.
requirements: Create dark mode token set mirroring light mode structure
Build wc-theme-switcher component for manual override
Add Storybook decorator for theme preview
Test all 13 components in both modes

actionItems.title: Create Professional Brand Color Palette
actionItems.description: Current colors (#007878 teal) are placeholder quality (5/10) and undermine library maturity perception. Need production-ready, cohesive palette with brand rationale and WCAG-verified contrast.
requirements: Design professional color system: primary, secondary, accent, neutrals
Add semantic colors: success, warning, error, info
Verify all combinations meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast (4.5:1)
Document color psychology and brand rationale
Update all 13 components with new palette
Create color documentation page in Astro docs
actionItems.timeline: First course of action after review (1-2 weeks)

actionItems.title: Fix Critical Accessibility Violations
actionItems.description: 4 critical WCAG 2.1 Level A failures block healthcare deployment: wc-checkbox keyboard pattern, wc-radio ARIA, wc-badge notifications, wc-card link role.
requirements: wc-checkbox: Remove tabindex="-1", restore native keyboard interaction
wc-radio: Add complete ARIA role/focus implementation for radio groups
wc-badge: Add semantic role for healthcare alert notifications
wc-card: Replace role="link" on div with semantic <a> element
Test all fixes with NVDA, JAWS, and VoiceOver

actionItems.title: Fix TypeScript Declaration File Generation
actionItems.description: Build configured for declaration:true but .d.ts files not generating. TypeScript consumers cannot use library safely, blocking enterprise adoption.
requirements: Debug Vite library mode declaration generation
Test type safety in consumer projects (React, Vue, Angular)
Add declaration file validation to CI

actionItems.title: Implement Deployment Automation and Multi-Environment Strategy
actionItems.description: No deployment automation, no staging environment, library not publishable (private: true), admin build failing.
requirements: Create GitHub Actions workflow for npm publishing
Fix 3 ESLint errors blocking admin build

actionItems.title: Create Drupal Integration Layer
actionItems.description: ZERO Drupal integration artifacts despite being primary consumer. No .twig files, libraries.yml, or PHP code. CDN distribution not configured.

actionItems.title: Install and Configure Changesets
actionItems.description: CLAUDE.md mandates changesets but not installed. Cannot manage versions/releases, blocks multi-dev workflow.
requirements: Create GitHub Action for automated releases

actionItems.title: Enable Minification and Optimize Bundle Sizes
actionItems.description: Minification disabled (30-40% size penalty). wc-form violates budget (6.3KB vs 5KB). Large CSS payloads embedded in JS.
requirements: Create shared token stylesheet to reduce duplication
Add bundle size budget enforcement to CI

actionItems.title: Generate VRT Baselines and Enable Cross-Browser Testing
actionItems.description: ZERO VRT baselines generated (36 tests dormant). Cross-browser testing not enabled (Chromium only).
requirements: Generate visual regression baselines for all components
Configure Chromatic for cloud VRT storage
Enable Firefox and WebKit in Playwright config

actionItems.title: Fix Documentation vs Reality Gaps
actionItems.description: 6 agents flagged documentation promising features not implemented. CLAUDE.md says 3 components (actually 13). Onboarding docs broken.
requirements: Fix broken remote script references in ONBOARDING.md
Document actual state vs roadmap clearly
Remove or mark features as 'planned' if not implemented

quickWins.title: Enable minification
quickWins.impact: 30-40% bundle size reduction across all components

quickWins.title: Add wc-container to Vite build config
Add missing super() calls in lifecycle methods
quickWins.impact: Prevents memory leaks and inheritance bugs

longTermImprovements.title: Create Storybook interaction tests for all components
Set up automated color contrast validation
Create theme switching decorator for Storybook

blockers: 4 critical WCAG 2.1 Level A failures (healthcare deployment blocked)
TypeScript declaration files not generating (enterprise blocker)
Zero Drupal integration artifacts (primary consumer blocked)

recommendedPhasing.focus: Fix v1.0 blockers and healthcare deployment issues
items: Quick wins: Enable minification, add LICENSE, fix docs (3h)

recommendedPhasing.focus: Enable deployment and primary consumer integration
Final quality improvements and v1.0 launch
items: Long-term improvements: Integration tests, Storybook enhancements
Final QA sweep and launch preparation

strengths: Test infrastructure: A+ (546 tests, 93.45% coverage, Vitest browser mode)
TypeScript config: A (strict mode, zero 'any' types)
Bundle size: Excellent (1.8KB for wc-button, 45.7KB full bundle under 50KB budget)
Token architecture: A (three-tier cascade, Shadow DOM compatible, 200+ tokens)
Turborepo config: A (correct task dependencies, caching strategy)
CI pipeline: A+ (7 quality gates enforced)
Component API design follows web standards
